news.t: Ways to target – or avoid — Big Tech and megacap stocks via ETFs amid AI frenzy
BlackRock Introduces Three iShares ETFs to Customize Exposure to U.S. Large Caps

holdings.infoBox: QTOP is an equity ETF with a total of 35 individual holdings. The top holdings are NVIDIA stock at 10.63%, Apple at 9.29%, Micron Technology at 7.10%, Microsoft at 6.02%, and Amazon.com at 5.45%.

overview.description: The iShares Nasdaq Top 30 Stocks ETF (QTOP) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the Nasdaq-100 Top 30 index. The fund aims to track an index composed of the 30 largest  companies by market-cap from the Nasdaq-100 Index. The components are weighted by market-cap with capping limits QTOP was launched on Oct 24, 2024 and is issued by BlackRock.

data.title: Blackrock's Jay Jacobs on AI infrastructure, megacaps and other ETF themes to watch in 2025
data.text: Jay Jacobs, head of U.S. BlackRock Thematic and Active ETFs, joins ‘Halftime Report' with CNBC's Bob Pisani to discuss the key themes to watch in the ETF space heading into 2025.

data.title: Ways to target – or avoid — Big Tech and megacap stocks via ETFs amid AI frenzy
data.text: “The shape of the U.S. equity market has undergone a massive change over just the last few years,” says BlackRock's Rachel Aguirre.

data.title: BlackRock Introduces Three iShares ETFs to Customize Exposure to U.S. Large Caps
data.text: NEW YORK--(BUSINESS WIRE)--The increasing prominence of mega-cap stocks in recent years underscores the critical need for investors to modernize the way they capture growth of some of the world's most...
